name: Eugene Livar
subject_line: Data: Arizona AG secured a $7 million APS settlement over
personalization_paragraph: Arizona AG secured a $7 million APS settlement over the May 2024 heat-related death of Katherine Korman, age 82, in Sun City West after APS ended its voluntary 95-degree heat hold three days before disconnecting her power. The data file pairs the headline finding with the named-corridor breakdown, methodology, and the raw records behind it.
